description: Product rating and review system with average calculation
acceptance_criteria: Navigate to Product Detail page for any seeded product.
Locate star rating input with data-testid='rating-stars' (1-5 stars).
Submit a review with 4-star rating and text comment.
Verify review appears immediately in review list with data-testid='review-item'.
Verify average rating updates and displays with data-testid='average-rating'.
Submit second review with different rating and verify average recalculates correctly.
Verify only authenticated users can submit reviews (guest sees login prompt).
Verify users can only review products they have purchased (check order history).
Verify review text validation: required, min 10 characters, max 500 characters.
